body.title: Re-key the decision-first skills to design-first; thread the proof-obligation field through
body.intention: I intend that the skills which are DECISION-first today (audit-design, audit-hypothesis, audit-ticket, /outcome, /weekly-retro) key on the DESIGN/INTENTION artifacts instead, and that the proof-obligation field is threaded through /ticket + /sorted + prebuild — so the whole skill set speaks the settled Intention->Design->Ticket stack.
body.description:
Once `design` is first-class (gated on T-design-first-artifact-type), re-key the decision-first skills the skills review flagged. audit-design: audit a DESIGN's decidedness + its fork-decisions. audit-hypothesis: proof-obligation well-formed at deconstruct. audit-ticket: consequence gate keyed on design/intention, not decision_id. /outcome + /weekly-retro: re-point 'decision hypothesis held?' to 'intention/design held?' (mostly rename; loop already exists). Thread the proof-obligation FIELD through /ticket, /sorted ticket-half, and the prebuild build_packet (prereg already locks the proof — wire the obligation into it).

**Affected files:** skills/audit-design/, skills/audit-hypothesis/, skills/audit-ticket/, skills/outcome/, skills/weekly-retro/, skills/ticket/, skills/sorted/, devlab/claudecode/build_packet.py + prereg.py (proof-obligation threading).
**Design rules:** homogeneity over special-case; every artifact carries its why; canonical-memory-home.
**Scope boundary:** IN — re-key the named skills from decision->design/intention + thread proof-obligation. OUT — the design artifact definition itself (T-design-first-artifact-type); OUT — devices; OUT — the LLM-middle. GATE: T-design-first-artifact-type closed.
**Test plan:** proof = a re-keyed audit gates on a design artifact (red->green: audit-ticket consequence gate fires on design-ref not decision_id). Honest close: shipped-unproven only if no red form.
**Completion criteria:** the 5 named skills key on design/intention; proof-obligation threaded /ticket->prebuild->prove; reconciled to architecture/workflow-levels.

Related: architecture/cc.0.workflow-levels.*, T-design-first-artifact-type, T-skills-review-prune-rearrange-intention-compat.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)

[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: Re-keyed the 5 decision-first skills (audit-design, audit-hypothesis, audit-ticket step 19, /outcome, /weekly-retro) + /ticket + /sorted to the settled INTENTION->DESIGN->TICKET stack, and fixed the /outcome->weekly-retro learning loop (write outcome to canonical design). PROVEN SUB-PART: proof-obligation threaded onto the ticket + surfaced by build_packet into proof_plan.proof_obligation (red->green @4158f4e4).
body.unproven_reason: The TITULAR re-key (5 skills now speak design/intention) is Haiku/prose with no executable filing-time gate to red->green against — a hollow re-key that only renames 'decision'->'design' passes the build_packet proof untouched. Missing lever: an executable audit-conformance harness that gates a re-keyed audit on a real design artifact (the ticket's own stated test plan). The build_packet threading is the proven sub-part; the prose re-key is not provable yet.
